title: Moderation Queue Update - 2026-04-29
body: We've completed processing the latest abuse queue. Two high-severity accounts (spam/phishing and harassment) have been banned. Two users received warnings for policy violations (off-topic posting and unauthorized automated activity). Reports against trusted team members were closed as unfounded. As a reminder, mass reporting/brigading will not result in action against community staff. If you have questions about moderation decisions, please reach out to the mod team privately.
